title: Dimensions

height.description: The numeric value of the height of the package.

length.description: The numeric value of the length of the package.

unit.description: The unit of measure used to express the height, length, and width of the package. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

width.description: The numeric value of the width of the package.

description: This complex type defines the dimensions of a package to be shipped.
